title: ARKHEVARA
subtitle: Digital Systems Atelier
description: The site itself — a never-unmounting WebGL canvas with route-bound camera choreography, 500k-particle curl-noise field, and raymarched SDF shaders running at 120fps.

title: NeuroVerse
subtitle: AI-Powered Learning Platform
description: Full-stack AI learning platform with real-time content generation, adaptive quiz engine, and multi-model inference pipeline serving 40k daily active users.

title: Library.online
subtitle: Premium Digital Library
description: Catalog of 20M+ books via Open Library API with integrated reader, favorites system, and a premium glassmorphic interface.

title: Physics Master 5.0
subtitle: Interactive Physics Education
description: Physics simulation platform with 60+ interactive experiments, real-time WebGL rendering, thermodynamics engine, and lab report generation.

title: Scraper Mesh α
subtitle: Distributed Data Collection
description: Multi-region scraper fleet with adaptive rate limiting, fingerprint rotation, residential proxy mesh, and real-time data pipeline to PostgreSQL.

title: LLM Gateway
subtitle: AI Inference Orchestration
description: Multi-provider LLM routing layer with streaming token delivery, cost optimization, fallback chains, and usage analytics dashboard.
